assertions.assertion: Uses ClaimMappings dictionary on SamlServiceProvider for per-SP attribute mapping
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows ClaimMappings = new Dictionary<string, string> on the SamlServiceProvider model.

assertions.assertion: Explains or shows AllowedScopes as a prerequisite for claims reaching ClaimMappings
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md explains the claim pipeline: 'AllowedScopes (identity resources) → filters available claim types → ClaimMappings.'

assertions.assertion: Shows how to set DefaultClaimMappings on SamlOptions for global defaults
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows: options.Saml.DefaultClaimMappings = new Dictionary<string, string>{...} in the configuration section.

assertions.assertion: The mapping correctly associates OIDC claim names (keys) to SAML attribute URIs (values)
